title: Sign in to access the workspace
description: This verifies that a returning user can sign in and reach the authenticated workspace.

steps.description: Switch to the sign in view
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the authenticated workspace is displayed

title: Update contact details in a loaded profile
description: This verifies that a loaded profile can be edited in the contact section and saved successfully.

steps.description: Load a profile in the editor
Verify a success notification is visible
Verify the updated contact details are displayed

title: Import a supported resume into the editor
description: This verifies that a supported resume file can be uploaded and opens the imported profile in the editor.

steps.description: Verify a loading indicator is displayed while the file is parsed
Verify the editor opens with the imported profile

title: Create a new account successfully
description: This verifies that a guest can create an account and see a success confirmation.

steps.description: Switch to the create account view
Fill in the username field with a unique test username
Fill in the email field with a valid email address
Fill in the password field with a valid password
Verify a success confirmation is visible

title: Continue as a guest
description: This verifies that a guest can continue without signing in and reach the upload or workspace area.

steps.description: Choose to continue as a guest
Verify the upload or workspace area is displayed

title: Request a password reset
description: This verifies that a user can request account recovery and see a success confirmation.

steps.description: Switch to the forgot password view
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Verify a success confirmation is visible

title: Update the professional summary and save it
description: This verifies that a user can edit the summary text, save it, and see the updated content persist in the editor.

steps.description: Load a profile in the editor
Verify a success notification is visible
Verify the updated summary is displayed

title: Open the password reset view from a reset link
description: This verifies that a reset-token deep link opens the password reset view and allows the user to submit a new password.

steps.description: Fill in the new password field with a valid new password
Verify a success confirmation is visible

title: Open a saved profile from the saved profiles list
description: This verifies that a user can review saved profiles and open one into the editor.

steps.description: Open a saved profile from the list
Verify the selected profile is loaded in the editor

title: Add work experience to the profile
description: A user can add a work experience entry with job details and see it appear in the experience list with its bullet points.

steps.description: Load a profile in the editor
Fill in valid start and end dates
Verify the new experience entry appears in the experience list

title: Add a skill to the profile
description: A user can add a new skill with its category and experience years and see it appear in the skills list.

steps.description: Load a profile in the editor
Fill in a new skill name
Fill in the years of experience
Verify the new skill appears in the skills list

title: Generate a resume analysis for a loaded profile
description: This test verifies that a user can open the analysis section for an imported profile and receive a completed AI resume analysis with key findings.

steps.description: Load a profile into the editor
Verify the analysis results are displayed
Verify the score and improvement guidance are displayed

title: Save AI provider settings
description: This verifies that a user can choose an AI provider, enter the matching API key, save settings, and see a success confirmation.

steps.description: Verify a success confirmation is visible

title: Generate a cover letter for a job application
description: This test verifies that a user can generate a cover letter for a specific role and company and see the completed letter content.

steps.description: Load a profile into the editor
Verify the generated cover letter is displayed

title: Search for jobs using profile skills
description: This verifies that a loaded profile can be used to search for relevant jobs and that ranked matches with source badges are shown.

steps.description: Load a saved profile into the editor
Search for jobs using the profile skills
Verify ranked job matches are displayed

title: Export the profile as JSON
description: This verifies that a loaded profile can be exported as JSON and that the export completes successfully.

steps.description: Load a saved profile into the editor

title: See a success toast after an import
description: This test verifies that importing a resume shows a success toast and the notification disappears automatically.

steps.description: Import a valid resume into the workspace
Verify a success toast is visible

title: Generate a career roadmap
description: This test verifies that a user can create a career roadmap for a target role and see the resulting milestone timeline and resources.

steps.description: Load a profile into the editor
Verify the roadmap timeline is displayed
Verify milestones and supporting resources are displayed

title: Add a project to the profile
description: A user can add a portfolio project with its details and see it appear in the projects list.
category: Profile Editor — Projects, Education, and Certifications

steps.description: Load a profile in the editor
Verify the new project appears in the projects list

title: Save local AI settings
description: This verifies that a user can enable local AI, enter Ollama connection details, save them, and see a success confirmation.

steps.description: Verify a success confirmation is visible

title: See a success toast after an AI action
description: This test verifies that a successful AI-powered action shows a toast notification and then clears automatically.

steps.description: Run an AI-powered action after configuring a provider
Verify a success toast is visible

title: Add education history to the profile
description: A user can add an education entry with institution, degree, field, and dates and see it appear in the education list.
category: Profile Editor — Projects, Education, and Certifications

steps.description: Load a profile in the editor
Fill in the field of study
Fill in valid start and end dates
Verify the new education entry appears in the education list

title: Export the profile as CSV
description: This verifies that a loaded profile can be exported as CSV and that the export completes successfully.

steps.description: Load a saved profile into the editor

title: See a success toast after a save
description: This test verifies that saving a profile-related change shows a success toast that appears briefly after the action.

steps.description: Make a small profile edit and save it
Verify a success toast is visible

title: Add a new social link to contact details
description: This verifies that a user can add a new contact link and see it appear in the list.

steps.description: Load a profile in the editor
Add a new link with a label and URL
Verify the new link appears in the list

title: Add a certification to the profile
description: A user can add a certification with its issuer and date and see it appear in the certifications list.
category: Profile Editor — Projects, Education, and Certifications

steps.description: Load a profile in the editor
Fill in a valid certification date
Verify the new certification appears in the certifications list

title: Open a job application link
description: This verifies that a user can choose a job match and open its external application page from the results list.

steps.description: Load a saved profile into the editor
Search for jobs using the profile skills
Open the application link for a job match
Verify the external application page opens

title: Search for jobs with filters applied
description: This verifies that a user can refine job results by title, location, and portal filter and still see matching results.

steps.description: Load a saved profile into the editor
Enter a job title into the title field
Enter a location into the location field
Verify filtered job results are displayed

title: Delete a saved profile from the list
description: This verifies that a user can remove a saved profile and see it disappear from the list.

steps.description: Verify the profile is removed from the list

title: Open a previously generated cover letter
description: This test verifies that a user can review a saved cover letter and open it to view the full contents.

steps.description: Load a profile into the editor
Open a previously generated cover letter
Verify the selected cover letter contents are displayed

title: Export the profile as XML
description: This verifies that a loaded profile can be exported as XML and that the export completes successfully.

steps.description: Load a saved profile into the editor

title: Open a saved career roadmap
description: This test verifies that a user can review a saved roadmap and open it to see the full plan details.

steps.description: Load a profile into the editor
Verify the roadmap details are displayed

title: Remove a skill from the profile
description: A user can remove an existing skill and confirm that it no longer appears in the skills list.

steps.description: Load a profile in the editor
Verify the skill no longer appears in the skills list

title: Review recent activity logs
description: This test verifies that a user can open the activity log view and review recent action history.

steps.description: Verify recent activity entries are displayed
Verify timestamps and action details are visible

title: Remove an existing social link from contact details
description: This verifies that a user can remove an existing contact link and see it disappear.

steps.description: Load a profile in the editor
Verify the link is removed from the list

title: Delete a saved cover letter
description: This test verifies that a user can remove a previously generated cover letter from the saved list.

steps.description: Load a profile into the editor
Delete a previously generated cover letter
Verify the cover letter is removed from the saved list

title: Save job board credentials
description: This verifies that a user can enter job board API credentials, save them, and see a success confirmation.

steps.description: Verify a success confirmation is visible

title: Export the profile as DOCX
description: This verifies that a loaded profile can be exported as DOCX and that the export completes successfully.

steps.description: Load a saved profile into the editor

title: Remove work experience from the profile
description: A user can remove an existing experience entry and confirm that it no longer appears in the experience list.

steps.description: Load a profile in the editor
Verify the experience entry no longer appears in the experience list

title: Delete a saved career roadmap
description: This test verifies that a user can remove a saved roadmap from the list of plans.

steps.description: Load a profile into the editor
Verify the roadmap is removed from the saved list

title: See a success toast after an export
description: This test verifies that exporting the current profile shows a success toast that dismisses on its own.

steps.description: Export the current profile in a supported format
Verify a success toast is visible

title: Close the saved profiles list and return to upload
description: This verifies that a user can close the saved profiles list and return to the upload view.

steps.description: Verify the upload view is displayed

title: See an analysis error when AI is not configured
description: This test verifies that starting resume analysis without configuring an AI provider shows an error instead of results.

steps.description: Load a profile into the editor
Verify an AI configuration error is displayed

title: Export the profile as PDF
description: This verifies that a loaded profile can be exported as PDF and that the export completes successfully.

steps.description: Load a saved profile into the editor

title: Remove a project, education entry, or certification
description: A user can remove an existing project, education entry, or certification and confirm it no longer appears in its list.
category: Profile Editor — Projects, Education, and Certifications

steps.description: Load a profile in the editor
Open the projects, education, or certifications section
Add an item in the selected section
Verify the item no longer appears in the selected list

title: Export the profile as LaTeX
description: This verifies that a loaded profile can be exported as LaTeX and that the export completes successfully.

steps.description: Load a saved profile into the editor

title: Show an error for an unsupported resume file
description: This verifies that uploading an unsupported or malformed file surfaces an error banner.

steps.description: Upload an unsupported or malformed file
Verify an error banner is visible

title: See a warning or error toast after a failed validation
description: This test verifies that an invalid user action triggers a visible warning or error toast instead of a silent failure.

steps.description: Attempt to save an invalid profile change
Verify an error or warning toast is visible

title: Export the profile as HTML
description: This verifies that a loaded profile can be exported as HTML and that the export completes successfully.

steps.description: Load a saved profile into the editor

title: See validation for invalid sign in credentials
description: This verifies that incorrect sign in details are rejected with an inline validation message.

steps.description: Switch to the sign in view
Fill in the username field with an invalid username
Fill in the password field with an invalid password
Verify an inline validation error is visible
